title: 对不起，我迟到了
pinyin: Duì bu qǐ, wǒ chí dào le
description_uz: «Nega endigina kelding?» — kechikkan do'st haqidagi suhbat. Bu dialog kechikish uchun uzr so'rash, sababini tushuntirish (telefon o'chdi, budilnik jiringlamadi, tirbandlik) va keyingi safar erta turishga va'da berishni mashq qiladi. Kundalik, foydali so'zlar bilan — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Почему ты только сейчас пришёл?» — разговор об опоздании. Диалог тренирует, как извиниться за опоздание, объяснить причину (разрядился телефон, не прозвонил будильник, пробка) и пообещать вставать раньше. Близкая тема и полезная лексика — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «Why are you only getting here now?» — a chat about being late. This dialogue practices apologizing for being late, explaining the reason (dead phone, alarm didn't ring, traffic), and promising to get up earlier next time. Relatable topic with useful vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.text_translation_en: Why are you only getting here now?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Duì bu qǐ, wǒ chí dào le.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Yǐ jīng bā diǎn sì shí le.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ jǐ diǎn qǐ chuáng de?
sentences.text_translation_en: What time did you get up?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ qī diǎn bàn qǐ de chuáng.
sentences.text_translation_en: I got up at seven thirty.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zěn me qǐ de zhè me wǎn?
sentences.text_translation_en: Why did you get up so late?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我的手机没电了，闹钟没响。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ de shǒu jī méi diàn le, nào zhōng méi xiǎng.
sentences.text_translation_ru: У меня телефон разрядился, будильник не прозвонил.
sentences.text_translation_en: My phone died, so the alarm didn't ring.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ shì zěn me lái de?
sentences.text_translation_en: So how did you get here?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我打车来的，路上还堵车。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ dǎ chē lái de, lù shang hái dǔ chē.
sentences.text_translation: Taksida keldim, yo'lda tirbandlik ham bor edi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Приехал на такси, ещё и пробка была.
sentences.text_translation_en: I came by taxi, and there was traffic on the way too.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Xià cì zǎo diǎn qǐ ba.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 知道了，我不会再迟到了。
sentences.pinyin: Zhī dào le, wǒ bú huì zài chí dào le.
sentences.text_translation_en: Got it, I won't be late again.
sentences.speaker: B
